{"id":"ADR-001","title":"Strict DDD Enforcement — Value Objects, Aggregate Roots, No Leaky Domains","status":"Accepted","date":"2026-03-22","decisions":["No throws in domain layer — all validation returns Result<T>","Class Value Objects: private constructor + static create(): Result<T> + generate() + equals() + toString()","Aggregate Roots: private constructor, fromSnapshot(), toSnapshot(), pullEvents()","Hexagonal Ports: every context needs ports/IXxx.ts + index.ts","Single source of truth: shared kernel re-exports only, never duplicates","Result propagation: no silent unwrap in domain","Map keys: always .toString() — never class VO instances as Map keys","Deprecated bridges: @deprecated tag, remove within 2 sprints"],"complianceChecks":["grep -rn 'throw new Error' src/domain must return 0","grep -rn 'readonly _brand' src/domain must return 0"],"file":"docs/adr/001-strict-ddd-enforcement.md"}

{"pattern":"no-domain-throws: Domain layer must never throw — all validation returns Result<T> = Ok(value) | Err(string)","type":"ddd-enforcement","confidence":1,"metadata":{"rule":"ADR-001","scope":"src/domain/**","exceptions":["result.ts unwrap()","*.test.ts","store.ts"]},"timestamp":"2026-03-22T18:24:04.375Z"}

{"pattern":"class-vo-pattern: IDs are class VOs — private constructor, static create(): Result<T>, static generate(): T, equals(), toString(). No branded strings.","type":"ddd-enforcement","confidence":1,"metadata":{"rule":"ADR-001","antiPattern":"type FooId = string & { readonly _brand: 'FooId' }","correctPattern":"class FooId { private constructor(readonly value: string) {} }"},"timestamp":"2026-03-22T18:24:08.412Z"}

{"pattern":"aggregate-fromsnapshot: Every aggregate must implement static fromSnapshot(raw: RawT): Result<T> for persistence rehydration. {"pattern":"map-key-stringification: Never use class VO instances as Map keys. JavaScript Maps use Object.is (reference equality). {"problem":"Silent exit on Windows launch — no window, no crash dump, no stderr output even with RUST_LOG=debug. Caused by windows_subsystem=windows suppressing all stderr in release builds. env_logger writes to stderr -> zero output. Need: (1) file logger before Tauri init, (2) panic hook writing to file, (3) WebView2 detection, (4) cross-platform startup hardening.","repo":"/home/koves/GitHub/runecode","currentVersion":"0.5.41","cargoConfig":"root .cargo/config.toml has /STACK:8388608 for Windows","keyFiles":["src-tauri/src/main.rs","src-tauri/src/lib.rs","src-tauri/Cargo.toml",".cargo/config.toml","src-tauri/capabilities/default.json","src-tauri/tauri.conf.json"]}
